import json, glob
searches={
'netanyahu_visit':['Netanyahu','visit Israel','soon'],
'ufc_hof':['UFC Hall of Fame','UFC 2026 Hall of Fame','Hall of Fame class'],
'wildfire_funds':['wildfire recovery funds','southern California wildfire','FEMA investigating'],
'iaea_meeting':['IAEA','special meeting','Ukraine'],
'fury_opponent':['Tyson Fury','April 11','comeback fight'],
'cl_champions':['Champions League playoff','Real Madrid','Benfica','Juventus','Newcastle'],
'cummins_replacement':['Pat Cummins','T20 World Cup squad','replacement'],
'grammy_aoty':['Album of the Year','Grammy','2026'],
}
paths=glob.glob('articles/2026/01/*/articles.jsonl')
cut='2026-01-21'
for name, terms in searches.items():
    print('\\n##',name)
    hits=[]
    for path in paths:
        for line in open(path, errors='ignore'):
            try:a=json.loads(line)
            except: continue
            dp=(a.get('date_publish') or '')[:10]
            if dp and dp>cut: continue
            text=((a.get('title') or '')+'\\n'+(a.get('content') or ''))
            low=text.lower()
            score=sum(1 for t in terms if t.lower() in low)
            if score>=2:
                hits.append((score,dp,a.get('source'),a.get('title'),a.get('url'),text))
    for score,dp,src,title,url,text in sorted(hits,key=lambda x:(-x[0],x[1]))[:8]:
        print(score, dp, src, title)
        print(' ',url)
        low=text.lower(); idx=min([low.find(t.lower()) for t in terms if low.find(t.lower())>=0] or [0])
        print(' ', text[max(0,idx-150):idx+450].replace('\\n',' '))
PY"
